fields.name: Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the series of the involved document, such as Purchasing or Sales.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the entry belongs to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved document.

fields.name: Posted
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the involved document has been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.
